task118.rule: Restore cyan cells hidden as gray where one to four radius-2/radius-3 plus crosses were drawn over random gray static.
task118.information_theoretic_blocker: The generated input-output relation is not a function: a cross can be entirely gray before drawing, leaving no observable red witness after cyan is hidden back to gray.
task118.decision: No deterministic model can satisfy the mandatory fresh 5000/5000 gate; all cheaper history is also cloaked, wrong, or runtime-failing.
